mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_submitted_resume_id.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO tbl_submitted_resume (submitted_resume_id, fk_memberid, title, address, self_intro, photo_path, education, career, language, portfolio, award, submitted_at, fk_edu_level_code, total_career_months, desired_salary) VALUES (#{submittedResumeId}, #{memberid}, #{title}, #{address}, #{selfIntro, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{photoPath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{education, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{career, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{language, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{portfolio, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{award, jdbcType=CLOB}, SYSDATE, #{eduLevelCode}, #{totalCareerMonths}, #{desiredSalary, jdbcType=NUMERIC})
mapper.select: SELECT submitted_resume_id AS submittedResumeId, fk_memberid AS memberid, title, address, self_intro AS selfIntro, photo_path AS photoPath, education, career, language, portfolio, award, TO_CHAR(submitted_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS submittedAt, fk_edu_level_code AS eduLevelCode, total_career_months AS totalCareerMonths, desired_salary AS desiredSalary FROM tbl_submitted_resume WHERE submitted_resume_id = #{submittedResumeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_application_techstack (fk_submitted_resume_id, fk_skill_id, proficiency) VALUES (#{submittedResumeId}, #{skillId}, #{proficiency})
INSERT INTO tbl_application_certificate (fk_certificate_code, fk_submitted_resume_id, acquired_date) VALUES (#{certificateCode}, #{submittedResumeId}, TO_DATE(#{acquiredDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))
mapper.select: SELECT S.skill_name AS "skillName", AT.proficiency AS "proficiency" FROM tbl_application_techstack AT JOIN tbl_skill S ON AT.fk_skill_id = S.skill_id WHERE AT.fk_submitted_resume_id = #{submittedResumeId} ORDER BY S.skill_name

SELECT C.certificate_name AS "certificateName", C.issuer AS "issuer", TO_CHAR(AC.acquired_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "acquiredDate" FROM tbl_application_certificate AC JOIN tbl_certificate C ON AC.fk_certificate_code = C.certificate_code WHERE AC.fk_submitted_resume_id = #{submittedResumeId} ORDER BY AC.acquired_date DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_job_application_id.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO tbl_job_application (application_id, fk_job_id, fk_memberid, fk_submitted_resume_id, name, birth_date, gender, phone, email, application_round, application_status, process_status, applied_at) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{jobId}, #{memberid}, #{submittedResumeId}, #{name}, TO_DATE(#{birthDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{gender}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{applicationRound}, 0, 0, SYSDATE)

SELECT seq_image_file_id.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO tbl_image_file (file_id, target_id, target_type, filecategory, file_url, created_at, original_filename) VALUES (#{fileId}, #{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{filecategory}, #{fileUrl}, SYSDATE, #{originalFilename})
mapper.select: SELECT file_id AS fileId, target_id AS targetId, target_type AS targetType, filecategory AS filecategory, file_url AS fileUrl, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt, original_filename AS originalFilename FROM tbl_image_file WHERE target_id = #{targetId} AND target_type = #{targetType} ORDER BY file_id

SELECT A.application_id AS applicationId, A.fk_job_id AS jobId, A.fk_memberid AS memberid, A.fk_submitted_resume_id AS submittedResumeId, A.name, TO_CHAR(A.birth_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS birthDate, A.gender, A.phone, A.email, A.application_round AS applicationRound, A.application_status AS applicationStatus, A.process_status AS processStatus, TO_CHAR(A.applied_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS appliedAt, TO_CHAR(A.cancelled_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS cancelledAt, TO_CHAR(A.viewed_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS viewedAt, J.title AS postTitle, C.company_name AS companyName, S.title AS resumeTitle, DECODE(A.process_status, 0, '미열람', 1, '열람', 2, '서류탈락', 3, '면접요청', 4, '합격', 5, '불합격') AS processStatusText, R.region_name AS regionName, JC.category_name AS categoryName, J.work_type AS workType, J.salary AS salary, TO_CHAR(J.deadline_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS deadlineAt, (SELECT I.file_url FROM tbl_image_file I WHERE I.target_type = 'company' AND I.filecategory = 'logo' AND I.target_id = CI.company_intro_id AND ROWNUM = 1) AS companyLogo FROM tbl_job_application A JOIN tbl_job_posting J ON A.fk_job_id = J.job_id JOIN tbl_company C ON J.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid JOIN tbl_submitted_resume S ON A.fk_submitted_resume_id = S.submitted_resume_id LEFT JOIN tbl_region R ON J.fk_region_code = R.region_code LEFT JOIN tbl_job_category JC ON J.fk_category_id = JC.category_id LEFT JOIN tbl_company_intro CI ON C.fk_memberid = CI.fk_memberid WHERE A.fk_memberid = #{memberid} AND A.application_status = 0 ORDER BY A.applied_at DESC

SELECT A.application_id AS applicationId, A.fk_job_id AS jobId, A.fk_memberid AS memberid, A.fk_submitted_resume_id AS submittedResumeId, A.name, TO_CHAR(A.birth_date, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS birthDate, A.gender, A.phone, A.email, A.application_round AS applicationRound, A.application_status AS applicationStatus, A.process_status AS processStatus, TO_CHAR(A.applied_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS appliedAt, TO_CHAR(A.cancelled_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS cancelledAt, TO_CHAR(A.viewed_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS viewedAt, J.title AS postTitle, C.company_name AS companyName, S.title AS resumeTitle, DECODE(A.process_status, 0, '미열람', 1, '열람', 2, '서류탈락', 3, '면접요청', 4, '합격', 5, '불합격') AS processStatusText, R.region_name AS regionName, JC.category_name AS categoryName, J.work_type AS workType, J.salary AS salary, TO_CHAR(J.deadline_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS deadlineAt FROM tbl_job_application A JOIN tbl_job_posting J ON A.fk_job_id = J.job_id JOIN tbl_company C ON J.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid JOIN tbl_submitted_resume S ON A.fk_submitted_resume_id = S.submitted_resume_id LEFT JOIN tbl_region R ON J.fk_region_code = R.region_code LEFT JOIN tbl_job_category JC ON J.fk_category_id = JC.category_id WHERE A.application_id = #{applicationId} AND A.fk_memberid = #{memberid}
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_job_application SET application_status = 1, cancelled_at = SYSDATE WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND fk_memberid = #{memberid} AND application_status = 0 AND process_status = 0
mapper.select: SELECT process_status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM tbl_job_application WHERE fk_memberid = #{memberid} AND application_status = 0 GROUP BY process_status
SELECT new_status AS "newStatus", TO_CHAR(changed_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "changedAt" FROM tbl_application_history WHERE fk_application_id = #{applicationId} ORDER BY changed_at ASC
SELECT JP.title AS "postTitle", JP.fk_memberid AS "companyMemberId" FROM tbl_job_posting JP WHERE JP.job_id = #{jobId}
